sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = Bankroll / (|Biggest Loss| / Optimal f). Example: $10,000 / (1 / 0.5) = $5,000. Requires quantified maximum adverse move and computed optimal f fraction.

source_rule_text: Position size is calculated by dividing bankroll by the ratio of biggest loss to negative optimal f, then trade that f percent of bankroll
